businessQuestion: Which customer segments contribute the highest revenue?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    CUSTOMER_SEGMENT,
    SUM(NET_SALES_AMT) AS TOTAL_REVENUE,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ORDER_ID) AS TOTAL_ORDERS,
    ROUND(SUM(NET_SALES_AMT)/COUNT(DISTINCT ORDER_ID),2) AS AVG_BASKET_VALUE
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SALES FS
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_CUSTOMER DC
ON FS.CUSTOMER_KEY = DC.CUSTOMER_KEY
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY TOTAL_REVENUE DESC;
businessContext: Marketing and merchandising teams want to understand which customer groups generate the largest share of sales.
